---
title: "fdr"
generated: true
description: "Unified false-discovery-rate correction."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fdr -->
```python
fdr(p_values: Float[Array, 'n'], *, method: FDRMethod = 'bh', alpha: float = 0.05, lam: float = 0.5) -> Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fdr -->
Unified false-discovery-rate correction.

`method`: `'bh'` (default -- Benjamini-Hochberg, valid under independence
/ PRDS), `'by'` (Benjamini-Yekutieli, valid under arbitrary dependence), or
`'storey'` (pi0-adaptive, higher power; `lam` tunes the `pi0` estimate).
Returns `(rejected, p_adjusted)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fdr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `n` | — | — |
| `method` | `FDRMethod` | — | `'bh'` | — |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.05` | — |
| `lam` | `float` | — | `0.5` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:fdr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
